narrative:
Warren City 2G (precinct in Trumbull County) has 671 registered voters, with 66.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.1 percentage points.
